titleStmt.title: SII 26.764: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 764. (A.R. No. 713 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is partly in verse and partly in prose.

The first section, which is in poetry records that a certain Kalakiyamuḍaiyāṉ Śūṟṟiy [.] Śīrkoṇḍilaṅgu Chatumaṟaivāṇaṉ, a Paḷḷi of Neṉmali caused the construction of the temples of Dachchiṉa Kayilāyamuḍaiyār and Tirurmēṟkōyil and the Mudurāntappērēri, and that the temples became dilapidated. It appears to state that they were renovated by a certain Sattiyavāchakan of Nellainagar.

The second section which is in prose, records that Valiya-daṇḍanāyakkaṉ, son of Ādappiḷḷai-daṇḍanāyakkaṉ of Śrī Madurāntaka [Aṟa*]ṇappuṟam, in Toṇḍai-maṇḍalam, who was a daṇḍanāyaka of Nāraśiṅgadēvaṉ caused the repairs to this śrī vimāna (the main temple), the name of which is not given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . ṟāyamukavaṇaikkallum pākkallu muṉṟum ne
ṉmali kāvva kāṇi Uṭaiya paḷḷikaḷil kalakiyakamuṭaiyāṉ cūṟṟiya
cir koṇṭilaṅ
ku catumaṟaivāṇaṉ Ū
rnaticciṉaRead ūrin tacciṉaº •kayilāyamu
ṭaiyār koyil cempo
ṉ maṇimakuṭa tiru
meṟkoyil cimaturāntap
pereriye rākarāca kucakkiṟantarit
tten mulamakaṇ Ūrukiṉṟa koyil
kapaṭāmaṉ maṇukātavvarinme
yataruvār kalantiṉituraiyuṅ ko
yil niḻpār kaṇṭaṉāḷ taniṟtāpit
tanapinap paḻaki nilai kulainta vakai
Elām paruti matiyuḷḷaḷavumaṭaivi
l nilainiṟka parintavai putukkuvi
ttān viram paṭaittaruḷumoru cat
tiyavācakan metinipuranta perumāḷ
viḷaṅku pukaḻ nellai nakaroṭaru
(ru)ḷunātaṉ kumāraṉ mevutamiḻ viṭṭa
ppane
svastiśrī In=ta śrīvimāṉat tiru
ppaṇi ceyvittāṉ nārasiṅka
devaṉ daṇḍanāyakkaril toṇ
ṭaimaṇṭalattu śrīmaturān=taka
ttu Aṟaṇappuṟattu Ātappiḷ
ḷai daṇḍanāyakkaṉ makaṉ va
liyadaṇḍanāyakkaṉ ḷa
Digital edition of SII 26.764 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
